top_findings.summary: The skill's "allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash(gcloud:*)" grants unrestricted access to the entire Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) command suite. While creating BigQuery ML models legitimately requires some GCP operations (e.g., BigQuery, IAM, Cloud Storage), full "gcloud:*" access is excessive and could be used to perform any GCP action across all services (compute, networking, IAM, etc.), far beyond the stated purpose of "bigquery ml model creator" operations. Permissions should be scoped to the specific APIs and resources needed for the task.
